tasks.description: Study the official documentation and build sample projects.
Create a new Angular application using the CLI.
Deploy the application to a cloud provider.
Configure Angular Router with lazy-loaded feature modules.
Write Jest unit tests for all services and components.
Install and configure Angular Material with a custom theme.
Add a global HTTP interceptor for auth headers and error handling.
Configure GitHub Actions to run lint, test and build on every push.
Cover critical user flows with Playwright end-to-end tests.
Analyze the production bundle and apply lazy loading and tree shaking.
Ensure all components pass WCAG AA checks using AXE.
Create a dark color palette and apply it globally via SCSS variables.
Define color tokens, typography scale and spacing guidelines.
Document all REST endpoints using OpenAPI/Swagger.
Establish pull request templates and review guidelines for the team.
